neptune.dbclusterparametergroup.Descript.Docs: Provides the customer-specified description for this DB cluster parameter group.

neptune.dbclusterparametergroup.Name.Docs: Provides the name of the DB cluster parameter group.

neptune.dbclusterparametergroup.Paramete.Docs: The parameters to set for this DB cluster parameter group.  The parameters are expressed as a JSON object consisting of key-value pairs.  If you update the parameters, some interruption may occur depending on which parameters you update.

neptune.dbclusterparametergroup.Tags.Docs: The tags that you want to attach to this parameter group.
